title: post api apuracao valid income analysis
description: Test the POST /api/apuracao endpoint with valid bank statement text and client details to verify it returns calculated income metrics including transactions, total income, monthly averages, and warnings with a 200 status.

title: post api apuracao no recognized transactions
description: Test the POST /api/apuracao endpoint with valid schema but textoExtrato containing no recognizable transactions to verify it returns a 422 Unprocessable Entity error indicating no recognized transactions.

title: post api apuracao validation error
description: Test the POST /api/apuracao endpoint with missing or invalid fields in the request body to verify it returns a 400 Validation error response.
